name: DriftKing 2D
short_description: DriftKing 2D is an endless random generated Drifting game!But the story starts with DriftKing 3D! Complete races & win the game![Public Beta]
detailed_description:
​DriftKing 2D/3D features:​

3D Hub world (Menu) Work in progress! -Beta
Story Mode. (DK 3D)
Endless Mode (DK 2D)
Races!
EasterEggs!
Multiple biomes to explore!
Collect new music!
Additional side-missions & Minigames!
Day/Night Cycle (21:00 PM Local Time = 21:00 PM In-Game Time)



2D & 3D Additional Steam/PC features:​

Achievements!
Play with Keyboard, Mouse, Controller or by using Touch!
Free updates! (Paid DLC will never happen!)
New and updated biomes, vehicles, missions, Music, Game modes, Secrets, Optimizations, bug fixes!, & more!
-Feedback is always very welcome & will directly impact development.-

- (Local) Splitscreen​ DK 2D & 3D multiplayer coming in the next Feature Update.



DriftKing 3D Game Mode - Concept Animation -Not ingame footage- Stay Tuned for more info!


The following Keys will be replaced with a new key when DriftKing3D (New Game mode in DriftKing2D) is launched! Stay Tuned.

RANDOM STEAM HALLOWEEN SALE 2019 GIVEAWAY KEY:

(QBX82-5JY38-VKMP*) (*=E)

RANDOM STEAM WINTER SALE 2019 GIVEAWAY KEY:

(L6RR3-RI358-9QW**) (**="FantasyFinal")

RANDOM STEAM Summer SALE 2020 GIVEAWAY KEY:

(Y7Q2B-PHRR5-E*N6K) (*="IX" (*="9")
